pre_existing_failures.note: All 25 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to this story's scope: icon-set resolution mismatches (e.g. 'lucide:phone' vs expected 'ph:phone-bold') in tests/unit/components/ThemeIcon.test.ts and tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts, stemming from the watercolor theme-set landing (commit a50edf4, predates this epic). No file in profile.tsx's or pairingAck.ts's dependency graph is involved. Treated as pre-existing debt this story did not introduce. Matches stories S01-S05's recorded baseline note exactly (same 25 failures, same root cause).

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one. Treated as NO_LINT baseline, not a failure. Matches S01-S05's recorded baseline.
